sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.0, 'A'), (2, 20.0, 'B'), (3, NULL, 'C'), (4, 30.0, 'A'), (5, 0.0, 'B');
CREATE TABLE second_table (id Int32, reference String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT id, runningDifferenceStartingWithFirstValue(value) AS diff FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value || ' - ' || t2.reference AS combined FROM test_table t1 JOIN second_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL AND diff > 5.0 ORDER BY combined;

SELECT id, value, runningDifferenceStartingWithFirstValue(value) AS running_diff FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE category = 'A') AS filtered GROUP BY id WITH ROLLUP HAVING running_diff IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT max(value) FROM test_table WHERE category = 'A') || ' - ' || (SELECT reference FROM second_table WHERE id = 1) AS concatenated_result;
SELECT id, value, IF(value IS NULL, 'No Value', value || ' present') AS value_status FROM test_table ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, runningDifferenceStartingWithFirstValue(value * 1.0) AS diff FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING diff IS NOT NULL;
